# Pull Request

## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New demo or feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Build/CI changes

## Content Type

- [ ] Demo app (`src/**/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`README.md`, `docs/`)
- [ ] Configuration (`.github/`, `.cursor/`)
- [ ] Tools (`tools/psscripts/`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Demo README includes purpose and run steps (if applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded TURN credentials or API keys
- [ ] Content is original synthesis (zero-copy) where applicable
- [ ] `npm run check` passes (if TS/JS changed at repo root)

---

**Note**: Personal WebRTC demo applications repo — Swamy PKV only.
